originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'n' during its initialization is never read

presenceCondition:
(or (and CONFIG_LOCKDEP
         CONFIG_SLAB
         CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER
         (not CONFIG_SLOB)
         (not CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES))
    (and CONFIG_LOCKDEP
         (not CONFIG_SLOB)
         CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES
         CONFIG_SLAB
         (not CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER))
    (and CONFIG_LOCKDEP
         CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER
         (not CONFIG_SLOB)
         (not CONFIG_SLAB)
         CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES)
    (and CONFIG_LOCKDEP
         CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER
         (not CONFIG_SLOB)
         (not CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES)
         (not CONFIG_SLAB))
    (and CONFIG_LOCKDEP
         CONFIG_SLAB
         CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER
         (not CONFIG_SLOB)
         CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES)
    (and CONFIG_LOCKDEP
         (not CONFIG_SLOB)
         (not CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES)
         CONFIG_SLAB
         (not CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER))
    (and CONFIG_LOCKDEP
         (not CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER)
         (not CONFIG_SLOB)
         (not CONFIG_SLAB)
         CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES)
    (and CONFIG_LOCKDEP
         (not CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER)
         (not CONFIG_SLOB)
         (not CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES)
         (not CONFIG_SLAB)))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SLAB () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_SLOB () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_LOCKDEP () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER () Bool
  false)
reasoning: The known VBDB bug for 0f8f8094d28.c is at L36 (int* cache = kmalloc_caches[i] when SLOB=T makes kmalloc_caches undeclared — compile error). This alarm is about int n = *cache at L41 (reported as L39 by the analyzer after preprocessing): n is initialized but never read — a genuine dead store and a different, new bug. No existing TRUE record for this file. The PC simplifies to LOCKDEP=T AND \!SLOB (8 clauses cover all combos of SLAB, FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER, PPC_256K_PAGES). LOCKDEP=T is required for the function to compile; \!SLOB is required for kmalloc_caches to be declared. Correctly constrained.
